title: Filesystem path traversal via user-supplied --app-code, --area, and artifact ID arguments
risk_statement: User-supplied values for --app-code, --area, and artifact IDs (TAP-*, ACT-*, MEO-*, SPEC-*, MR-*) were concatenated directly into file paths via path.join() without character validation or root-boundary checks. A crafted value containing ../ or absolute path segments could escape the provenance/ directory and read or write files anywhere the process has access.

acceptance.reason: Risk mitigated in v2.2.0: validateCode() enforces character allowlist on all code/area inputs; safePath() verifies all constructed paths remain under the provenance root.

mitigations.detail: validateCode() added to utils.ts — enforces ^[A-Z0-9_-]{1,16}$/i allowlist on all --app-code and --area values before use in path construction.
safePath() added to utils.ts — resolves path and asserts it stays under the intended root directory. Used in tapShow, tapDone, actShow, meoShow, specShow, mistakeShow.
journal export, visualize, and export commands validate --output against a forbidden system-path list before writing.
